titleStmt.title: SII 17.739: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 739. (A.R. No. 682 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar built into the first prākāra of the Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.
This inscription cites both the years 3 and 4 of the king.

This records the gift of some precious jewels set with stones such as rubies (māṇikkam), sapphire (maragadam), diamonds and pearls (in all 105) and ten flowers made of gold for the deities Mullai Aḻagar alias Śrī Pāśupatadēva and Astradēva in the temple of Tirumullaivāyal, in Kāṉappēṟūr-nāḍu, in Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam and refers to some provision for food offerings and for the conduct of services like abhishēka and for taking out the deities in procession.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koppa
rakecaripanmarāna [śrīrā]
jendracoḻadevarkku yā
ṇṭu 3 Āvatum yāṇṭu
4 Āvatum puḻaṟkoṭṭa
ttu kāṉappeṟūr nāṭ
ṭu tirumullaivāyili
l śrīpali Eḻuntaruḷa śrīpā
cupatadevarāṉa mullai
aḻakaraiyum Astrade
varaiyum Eḻuntaruḷuvit
tu mullai Aḻakar Abhi
ṣekattu māṇikkam
nāṟpattu nālu marakata
m Eṭṭum vayiram mup
pattiraṇṭum muttu Iru
pattoṉṟum Āka ratna
m nūṟṟaiñciṉāl niṟai
kaḻañcey mañcāṭiyum
Iraṇṭu māvum poṉ Aiy
ṅkaḻañcum Uṭpaṭa niṟai
aṟu kaḻañcey mañcāṭi
yum Iraṇṭumāvum mālaiyi
l māṇikkam patinālum
marakatam Iraṇṭum vayiram
muppattiraṇṭum Āka nāṟ
patteṭṭiṉāl niṟai A
raikkaḻañcum poṉ Iru
kaḻañcum Uṭpaṭa niṟai Iruka
ḻañcaraiyum poṟpū Oṉ
ṟināl niṟai kālākap
poṟpūp pattiṉāl niṟai
irukaḻañcaraiyum cāttu
vittu Itdevarkaḷḷi
ruvarkkum nāḷ Oṉṟinuk
ku tiruvamutarici kuṟuṇi nā
nāḻiyum kaṟiyamutum
neyyamutu n=tayiramu
tum Aṭaikkāyamutum
candrādityavat Amutu Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.739 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
